scenario: First passport for a minor applicant, filed with both parents' Section D consent because custody is joint: first parent has joint custody and is the biological parent with no other nationality acquired before 1 September 2015; second parent also has joint custody, acquired another nationality before 1 September 2015, and establishes kinship on an 'other' basis requiring a written explanation. Because the first parent declares joint (not sole) custody, the second parent's own block becomes required too — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.applicantDateAndSignature: 2026-07-11, signed in person by first parent on the child's behalf
fields.secondParentKinshipOtherDetails: Step-parent, formally recognised as co-guardian by court order
